nodes.name: config.toml
nodes.summary: Supabase CLI config registering the lookup-code and create-pair edge functions with JWT verification enabled and their Deno import maps.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Deno edge function (service-role): marks a partner's Desire Map complete, resolves the couple track, and when both finish computes positive matches over shared items (excluding boundaries) into desire_matches with one server-authoritative free reveal.
nodes.languageNotes: isFreeReveal and the match write are server-authoritative so the paywall cannot be bypassed by the client.

nodes.name: matchType
nodes.summary: Classifies two partner ratings on a shared desire item into mutual (both excited), adjacent (any other positive pairing), or null (no match).

nodes.name: .npmrc
nodes.summary: Placeholder npm registry configuration comment for the create-pair edge function's private package imports.

nodes.name: deno.json
nodes.summary: Deno import map for the create-pair edge function, aliasing the Supabase functions-js JSR package.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Deno edge function (service-role): validates a pairing code (existence, expiry, self-pair, prior-couple guards), creates a couples row, marks both profiles linked, and consumes the code.
nodes.languageNotes: Earlier variant that keys couples on the ids passed in the body; rapid-task is the profile-id-resolving successor used by the iOS app.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Deno edge function (service-role): returns only the linked partner's display name and pronouns for the caller's couple, since per-row RLS cannot expose cross-partner columns.
nodes.languageNotes: Column-scoped service-role read is the only path a partner's name reaches the client without exposing the rest of the row.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Deno edge function (service-role): the only path that grants Core to a couple, authorizing via Apple StoreKit receipt or an admin secret, writing the entitlements ledger, then recomputing the couple's access_tier.
nodes.languageNotes: Apple JWS verification is an M2 seam that fails closed (returns null) so the Apple path cannot bypass the paywall before it is hardened.

nodes.name: verifyAppleTransaction
nodes.summary: Fail-closed M1 stub for Apple StoreKit 2 signed-transaction (JWS) verification; returns null unless APPLE_VERIFICATION_ENABLED is set, deferring real x5c/ES256 verification to M2.

nodes.name: .npmrc
nodes.summary: Placeholder npm registry configuration comment for the lookup-code edge function's private package imports.

nodes.name: deno.json
nodes.summary: Deno import map for the lookup-code edge function, aliasing the Supabase functions-js JSR package.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Deno edge function (service-role): validates a pairing code's existence and expiry and returns the inviter's display name and pronouns for the 'you're pairing with...' preview.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Deno edge function (slug rapid-task, the app's create-couple endpoint): claims a pairing code, resolves both partners' profile ids, creates the couples row, links both profiles, inherits any payer-portable entitlement, and deletes the code.
nodes.languageNotes: Resolves user_profiles.id from auth ids before insert to satisfy the couples FK, fixing the earlier auth-id FK violation.

nodes.name: AppShell.swift
nodes.summary: Root authenticated container view that switches between the Home, Play, Map, and Learn tabs and anchors the RacetrackTabBar above the home indicator.

nodes.name: AppShell
nodes.summary: SwiftUI View holding the selected AppTab and rendering the matching feature tab wrapped in TabContentWrapper with the RacetrackTabBar overlay.

nodes.name: ModelContainer.swift
nodes.summary: Defines the SwiftData SchemaV1 (the single registry of all @Model types) and the app's disk-backed and in-memory ModelContainer factories.
nodes.languageNotes: Explicit Application Support store URL keeps the database inside the Data Protection sandbox; fatalError on init surfaces schema mismatches at launch.

nodes.name: SchemaV1
nodes.summary: VersionedSchema enum listing every registered SwiftData @Model type (Couple, UserProfile, CardSession, EntitlementRecord, and more) as the single source of truth for the persistence schema.

nodes.name: AppMigrationPlan
nodes.summary: SchemaMigrationPlan enum registering SchemaV1 with empty migration stages, correct while no shipped users exist.

nodes.name: AppAnimation.swift
nodes.summary: Design-token namespace of all named SwiftUI animations and ambient durations (reactive springs, OB card physics, looping shimmers) plus Reduce-Motion-safe helpers.
nodes.languageNotes: Provides reduceMotionSafe and an ambientAnimation modifier so every looping animation has a Reduce Motion fallback.

nodes.name: AppAnimation
nodes.summary: Enum namespace exposing the app's reactive animations, OB card-physics curves, and ambient looping durations as the only sanctioned animation tokens.

nodes.name: AppColors.swift
nodes.summary: Central color-token system (void/surfaces/text/accent/feedback/shadows and spectrum gradient stops) that all views must reference instead of raw colors, with Color hex helpers.
nodes.languageNotes: Sole source of color after the dark-only consolidation removed the legacy AppPalette light/dark system.

nodes.name: AppColors
nodes.summary: Struct of static color tokens spanning OB canvas, surfaces, text tiers, accents, feedback, shadows, and the cyan-purple-magenta spectrum gradient.

nodes.name: AppElevation.swift
nodes.summary: Elevation/shadow token namespace plus cardElevation/modalElevation view modifiers that apply the correct shadow stack for the current color scheme.

nodes.name: AppElevation
nodes.summary: Enum namespace defining card and modal shadow elevation tokens and the OB physics cardShadow(elevation:) ramp.

nodes.name: AppFonts.swift
nodes.summary: Typography token system mapping semantic roles (heroTitle, cardTitle, bodyText, ctaLabel) to the ClashDisplay and Switzer faces with display/body constructors for custom sizes.

nodes.name: AppFonts
nodes.summary: Struct of semantic font tokens over the ClashDisplay (display) and Switzer (body) families plus dynamic-type-aware constructors.

nodes.name: AppGlows.swift
nodes.summary: Glow-effect token namespace and view modifiers (spectrumBorderGlow, cornerDeckGlow, safetyGlow) so views express glows through tokens instead of raw shadows.

nodes.name: AppGlows
nodes.summary: Enum namespace holding the app's spectrum, corner-deck, accent-focus, and safety glow parameters consumed by the AppGlows view modifiers.

nodes.name: AppGrid.swift
nodes.summary: Layout-grid token struct defining column counts, gutters, and grid math used to align content to the app's spacing system.

nodes.name: AppGrid
nodes.summary: Struct of grid tokens (columns, gutters, margins) providing the structural layout grid for app surfaces.

nodes.name: AppLayout.swift
nodes.summary: GeometryProxy-derived layout resolver exposing screen/card/safe-area metrics and the mandatory OB and session card sizing helpers, replacing all UIScreen.main usage.
nodes.languageNotes: AppLayout.from(geo) is the iOS-26-compliant replacement for UIScreen.main.bounds; OB/session card sizes are all proportional helpers.

nodes.name: AppLayout
nodes.summary: Struct resolved from a GeometryProxy that vends screen/card/safe-area dimensions plus static OB card, fan, and session card sizing functions.

nodes.name: AppRadius.swift
nodes.summary: Semantic corner-radius token namespace (micro through sheet, plus OB-only obCard/cornerCard/foilEdge) that every clip and rounded-rectangle must reference.

nodes.name: AppRadius
nodes.summary: Enum namespace of corner-radius tokens on a 4pt grid, including device-matched sheet corners and OB-canvas-exclusive card radii.

nodes.name: AppRootView.swift
nodes.summary: Top-level routing gate that shows the splash once per cold launch, then reactively routes to onboarding, sign-in, or AppShell based on AppState and AuthService.
nodes.languageNotes: Onboarding gates before auth because pairing's persistLink needs the local UserProfile that OnboardingStore.commit creates.

nodes.name: AppRootView
nodes.summary: SwiftUI View reading AuthService, AppState, and scenePhase to decide the post-splash destination and suppress splash replay on foreground resume.

nodes.name: AppSafeArea.swift
nodes.summary: Safe-area utilities: a real-safe-area environment key and AppLayout extension so views can read true device insets without UIScreen, with helper view modifiers.

nodes.name: AppSpacing.swift
nodes.summary: Semantic spacing token namespace (xxs through xxl on an 8pt grid) that every padding, gap, and offset must reference instead of raw numbers.

nodes.name: AppSpacing
nodes.summary: Enum namespace of CGFloat spacing tokens on an 8pt grid, the sole sanctioned source for padding and gap values.

nodes.name: AppTheme.swift
nodes.summary: Defines the ThemeMode enum (system/light/dark) retained for persistence after the app was hard-locked to dark and the legacy AppPalette was removed.

nodes.name: ThemeMode
nodes.summary: CaseIterable enum of theme modes with display names and SF Symbol icons, kept for settings persistence though the app forces dark.
